item.title: Reverse engineering circuitry in a Spacelab computer from 1980 摘要
item.description:
The article reverse-engineers the ALU/register board of the Mitra 125 MS minicomputer used in Spacelab, a European-built reusable laboratory flown on the Space Shuttle. The computer, built from TTL logic chips rather than a microprocessor, used eight 74181 ALU chips to create a 32-bit ALU for a 16-bit machine, likely to speed up multiplication and floating-point operations. The ALU/register circuitry spanned three boards, with multiplexers selecting inputs and shift registers supporting multiplication and division. The article details the architecture, including the 74181 chip's capabilities and the use of carry-lookahead chips.
标签: Spacelab, Mitra 125 MS, reverse engineering, ALU, 74181, TTL logic, minicomputer, space computing, vintage hardware, NASA

item.title: On the <dl> 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses lesser-known features of the HTML <dl> element. Key points include: a <dt> can have multiple <dd> elements; <dt> and <dd> can be grouped in a <div> for styling; ARIA labels can be used; and since 2008, they are called 'description lists' not 'definition lists'. A valid example is provided, along with a reference to Adrian Roselli's note on screen reader support.
标签: html, css, web-standards, accessibility, screen-readers, aria, semantic-html, frontend, web-development
